stmt: SELECT `id`, `{col1}`, `{col2}` FROM `{db}`.`{table}` ORDER BY `{col1}` DESC LIMIT 100
SELECT DISTINCT `{col1}` FROM `{db}`.`{table}` WHERE `{col2}` IS NOT NULL
SELECT t1.`id`, t1.`{col1}` FROM `{db}`.`{table}` t1 INNER JOIN `{db}`.`{table2}` t2 ON t1.`id` = t2.`{col1}` WHERE t2.`{col2}` = ?
SELECT SUM(`{col1}`) AS total, DATE(`{col2}`) AS dt FROM `{db}`.`{table}` GROUP BY DATE(`{col2}`)
